## Type of change

- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, factual correction)
- [ ] Improvement (clearer explanation, better example)
- [ ] New roadmap leaf (10 files)

## Editorial checklist

- [ ] Educational content is in **English only** (no mixed Uzbek/English)
- [ ] All internal links resolve (`mkdocs build --strict` is clean)
- [ ] No `TEMPLATE.md` content leaked into a real page
- [ ] Tone matches existing leaves (technical, direct, worked examples)
- [ ] If a roadmap leaf: all 10 files present (`junior`, `middle`, `senior`, `professional`, `specification`, `interview`, `tasks`, `find-bug`, `optimize`, `index`)
- [ ] If a Leetcode solution: includes Go, Java, and Python with complexity analysis

## Local verification

- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes
- [ ] `mkdocs serve` — opened the new/changed pages in a browser, no broken layout
